name: Invercap S.A.
summary: Invercap S.A. engages in mining and steel businesses in Chile, Argentina, Brazil, and Peru. The company produces and sells steel products, including bars, flat products, structural tubes, pipes, and open profiles. It also provides shaped steel products for structural use and conduction of steel fluids for road safety and construction markets. In addition, the company operates hydroelectric plants. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Santiago, Chile.
